jobs.title: Electric Vehicle Subsidy Yojana 2026, इलेक्ट्रिक स्कूटर खरीदने पर ₹30,000 तक सब्सिडी, जानें पात्रता, आवेदन प्रक्रिया और जरूरी दस्तावेज
jobs.how_to_apply: EV Subsidy Portal पर जाएं। Apply for Subsidy विकल्प पर क्लिक करें। वाहन नंबर दर्ज करें। चेसिस नंबर के अंतिम 5 अंक भरें। RC से जुड़े मोबाइल नंबर पर प्राप्त OTP से सत्यापन करें। बैंक खाते की जानकारी दर्ज करें। सभी आवश्यक दस्तावेज अपलोड करें। आवेदन फॉर्म की जांच करके Submit करें। आवेदन सफल होने पर आपको Application Number मिलेगा, जिससे आप अपने आवेदन का स्टेटस ऑनलाइन ट्रैक कर सकते हैं।

jobs.title: PSSSB Craft Instructor Vacancy 2026, Apply online
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://sssb.punjab.gov.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

jobs.jobs_info: Shri Balaji Computers Work From Home Vacancy 2026: Mukhyamantri Work From Home Yojana 2026 के तहत भीलवाड़ा जिले की Shri Balaji Computers संस्था द्वारा Dizidocs Associates पदों के लिए भर्ती निकाली गई है। इस अवसर के तहत कुल 100 पदों पर महिलाओं को घर बैठे या डिजिटल माध्यम से कार्य करने का मौका दिया जाएगा। इस पद के लिए न्यूनतम शैक्षणिक योग्यता Graduate पास निर्धारित की गई है। आवेदन करने के लिए किसी पूर्व अनुभव की आवश्यकता नहीं बताई गई है। इच्छुक महिला उम्मीदवार Jul 31, 2026 तक ऑनलाइन आवेदन कर सकती हैं

jobs.title: RRB Technician Vacancy 2026, Notification Out for 6,565 Posts, Check Details

application_fees.payment_mode: Online via Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / UPI.

selection_process: Skill Test (if required for a specific post)
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://www.rrbcdg.gov.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

The official notification for Railway RRB Technician Recruitment 2026 was published in the Employment Newspaper dated May 23-29, 2026. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official RRB website.

jobs.salary_pay_scale: Pay Matrix Level-2: ₹19,900/- per month (Grade-C). Pay Matrix Level-1: ₹18,000/- per month (Grade-C).
selection_process: Skill Test (if required for a specific post)
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the RRC Jaipur website and select the “Scouts & Guides Quota” notification. Register through New Registration and obtain login details. Login and fill out the form; fill out separate forms for Level 2 and Level 1. Upload the required documents (educational, Scout/Guide certificate, caste/income, etc.). Pay the application fee online, submit the application, and save the printout.

jobs.title: RRC Jaipur Cultural Quota Recruitment 2026-27, Check Eligibility Criteria & How to Apply
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the RRC Jaipur website (www.rrcjaipur.in) and click on the Cultural Quota 2026-27 notification link. Click on New User Registration and fill in the required details, including name, email, mobile number, etc. Note down the registration ID and password received via email/SMS upon completing the registration. Log in and upload the required documents (photo, signature, qualification-related certificates, etc.). Pay the application fee online. Submit the application and preserve the application receipt/email.
